heading: Subornation of perjury
label: 1622 Subornation of perjury
text: Whoever procures another to commit any perjury is guilty of subornation of perjury, and shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 232 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 12635 Stat. 1111The punishment prescribed in was substituted for the reference thereto.section 1621 of this titleMinor change was made in phraseology.
Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $2,000”.Pub. L. 103–322
